# CWE-307 — Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-307-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"sync"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	Email string
	Hash  string
}

var loginAttempts sync.Map

// Safe: blocks client after five failures inside a sliding minute window.
func PasswordLogin(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	key := c.ClientIP()
	if n, _ := loginAttempts.LoadOrStore(key, 0); n.(int) >= 5 {
		c.JSON(429, gin.H{"error": "rate limited"})
		return
	}
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	var u User
	if db.Where("email = ?", email).First(&u).Error != nil {
		cur, _ := loginAttempts.Load(key)
		loginAttempts.Store(key, cur.(int)+1)
		time.Sleep(200 * time.Millisecond)
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "bad creds"})
		return
	}
	loginAttempts.Delete(key)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"token": "issued"})
}
